on persistence_changed{thread-unsafe}
	if(pgs_init{int} {pgs_init}  = 0)
		pgs_init{int} {pgs_init}  := 1
		call analyze_vibrato_groups{UserDefined, Call, analyze_vibrato_groups}
		i{int} {i}  := 0
		while(i{int} {i}  <= 15) 
			if(get_control_par(btn_keyswitches_purge[i{int} {i} ]{int} {btn_keyswitches_purge} , CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_VALUE} ){Builtin, None, get_control_par} = 1)
				set_control_par_str(btn_keyswitches[i{int} {i} ]{int} {btn_keyswitches} , CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE} , "alpha"){Builtin, None, set_control_par_str}
			else
				set_control_par_str(btn_keyswitches[i{int} {i} ]{int} {btn_keyswitches} , CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE} , "btn_keyswitch"){Builtin, None, set_control_par_str}
			end if
			inc(i{int} {i} ){Builtin, None, inc}
		end while
		call apply_gui{UserDefined, Call, apply_gui}
		call apply_gui_keyswitch{UserDefined, Call, apply_gui_keyswitch}
		call reset.keycolors{UserDefined, Call, reset.keycolors}
		call update.keyswitch{UserDefined, Call, update.keyswitch}
		call update.cc_dynamics{UserDefined, Call, update.cc_dynamics}
		call update.cc_expression{UserDefined, Call, update.cc_expression}
		call update.cc_vibrato{UserDefined, Call, update.cc_vibrato}
		i{int} {i}  := 0
		while(i{int} {i}  <= 15) 
			if(_keyswitch[(i{int} {i}  * num_elements(keyswitch_idx{int[]} {keyswitch_idx} ){Builtin, None, num_elements}) + 4]{int} {_keyswitch}  = 3)
				keyswitch_idx2[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} {NI_CALLBACK_ID}  mod 100]{int} {keyswitch_idx2}  := _keyswitch[(i{int} {i}  * num_elements(keyswitch_idx{int[]} {keyswitch_idx} ){Builtin, None, num_elements}) + 11]{int} {_keyswitch}

on ui_control(sli_envRateCurve{int} {sli_envRateCurve} ){thread-unsafe}

	end while
	tbl_rate.curve{int} {tbl_rate.curve}  := sli_envRateCurve{int} {sli_envRateCurve}

on async_complete
	if(NI_ASYNC_ID{int} {NI_ASYNC_ID}  = save_id{int} {save_id} )
		if(NI_ASYNC_EXIT_STATUS{int} {NI_ASYNC_EXIT_STATUS}  = 1)
			save_id{int} {save_id}  := -1
		else
			if(NI_ASYNC_EXIT_STATUS{int} {NI_ASYNC_EXIT_STATUS}  = 0)
				save_id{int} {save_id}  := 0
			end if
		end if
	end if
	if(NI_ASYNC_ID{int} {NI_ASYNC_ID}  = load_id{int} {load_id} )
		if(NI_ASYNC_EXIT_STATUS{int} {NI_ASYNC_EXIT_STATUS}  = 1)
			load_id{int} {load_id}  := -1
		else
			if(NI_ASYNC_EXIT_STATUS{int} {NI_ASYNC_EXIT_STATUS}  = 0)
				load_id{int} {load_id}  := 0
			end if
		end if
	end if
end on

	set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_VOLUME{int} {ENGINE_PAR_VOLUME} , lookup.volume[real_to_int(((int_to_real(sli_transition_volume{int} {sli_transition_volume} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real} * 61) / 1e+06) + 1765){Builtin, None, real_to_int}]{int} {lookup.volume} , -1, -1, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} {NI_BUS_OFFSET} ){Builtin, None, set_engine_par}
	set_control_par_str(get_ui_id(lbl_transition_volume{int} {lbl_transition_volume} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, CONTROL_PAR_TEXT{int} {CONTROL_PAR_TEXT} , get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_VOLUME{int} {ENGINE_PAR_VOLUME} , -1, -1, NI_BUS_OFFSET{int} {NI_BUS_OFFSET} ){Builtin, None, get_engine_par_disp} & " dB"){Builtin, None, set_control_par_str}
	last_time_transition_volume{int} {last_time_transition_volume}  := ENGINE_UPTIME{int} {ENGINE_UPTIME} 
	wait(800000){Builtin, None, wait}
	if((ENGINE_UPTIME{int} {ENGINE_UPTIME}  - last_time_transition_volume{int} {last_time_transition_volume} ) > 795)
		set_text(lbl_transition_volume{int} {lbl_transition_volume} , "Transition Volume"){Builtin, None, set_text}
	end if
end on

end on

	if(btn_settings{int} {btn_settings}  = 1)
		Boolean0{int} {Boolean0}  := 0
		call all_windows.show{UserDefined, Call, all_windows.show}
		result7{int} {result7}  := 1
		call settings.show{UserDefined, Call, settings.show}
	else
		Boolean0{int} {Boolean0}  := 0
		call all_windows.show{UserDefined, Call, all_windows.show}
		min1{int} {min1}  := 1
		call home.show{UserDefined, Call, home.show}
	end if
end on

end on

function update.row_fonts
	j{int} {j}  := 0
	while(j{int} {j}  <= 15) 
		i{int} {i}  := 0
		while(i{int} {i}  <= (num_elements(keyswitch_idx{int[]} {keyswitch_idx} ){Builtin, None, num_elements} - 1)) 
			if(_UI_keyswitch[(j{int} {j}  * num_elements(keyswitch_idx{int[]} {keyswitch_idx} ){Builtin, None, num_elements}) + i{int} {i} ]{int} {_UI_keyswitch}  # 0)
				set_control_par(_UI_keyswitch[(j{int} {j}  * num_elements(keyswitch_idx{int[]} {keyswitch_idx} ){Builtin, None, num_elements}) + i{int} {i} ]{int} {_UI_keyswitch} , CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE} , _font.2pt8[get_control_par(_UI_keyswitch[j{int} {j}  * num_elements(keyswitch_idx{int[]} {keyswitch_idx} ){Builtin, None, num_elements}]{int} {_UI_keyswitch} , CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_VALUE} ){Builtin, None, get_control_par} * 2]{int} {_font.2pt8} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
			end if
			inc(i{int} {i} ){Builtin, None, inc}
		end while
		inc(j{int} {j} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
end function

function reset.keycolors
	key[1]{int} {key}  := 0
	while(key[1]{int} {key}  <= 127) 
		set_key_color(key[1]{int} {key} , KEY_COLOR_INACTIVE{int} {KEY_COLOR_INACTIVE} ){Builtin, None, set_key_color}
		inc(key[1]{int} {key} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
end function

function update.keycolor_mapped
	key[1]{int} {key}  := _keyswitch[(Boolean1{int} {Boolean1}  * num_elements(keyswitch_idx{int[]} {keyswitch_idx} ){Builtin, None, num_elements}) + 13]{int} {_keyswitch} 
	while(key[1]{int} {key}  <= _keyswitch[(Boolean1{int} {Boolean1}  * num_elements(keyswitch_idx{int[]} {keyswitch_idx} ){Builtin, None, num_elements}) + 14]{int} {_keyswitch} ) 
		set_key_color(key[1]{int} {key} , KEY_COLOR_INACTIVE{int} {KEY_COLOR_INACTIVE} ){Builtin, None, set_key_color}
		if(_keyswitch_mapped_notes[(Boolean1{int} {Boolean1}  * 128) + key[1]{int} {key} ]{int} {_keyswitch_mapped_notes}  = 1)
			set_key_color(key[1]{int} {key} , Boolean0{int} {Boolean0} ){Builtin, None, set_key_color}
		end if
		inc(key[1]{int} {key} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
end function

function color_keyswitches
	key[0]{int} {key}  := 0
	while(key[0]{int} {key}  <= 15) 
		set_key_color(keyswitches[key[0]{int} {key} ]{int} {keyswitches} , KEY_COLOR_INACTIVE{int} {KEY_COLOR_INACTIVE} ){Builtin, None, set_key_color}
		if((_keyswitch[key[0]{int} {key}  * num_elements(keyswitch_idx{int[]} {keyswitch_idx} ){Builtin, None, num_elements}]{int} {_keyswitch}  = 1) and (_keyswitch[(key[0]{int} {key}  * num_elements(keyswitch_idx{int[]} {keyswitch_idx} ){Builtin, None, num_elements}) + 1]{int} {_keyswitch}  # 127))
			set_key_color(_keyswitch[(key[0]{int} {key}  * num_elements(keyswitch_idx{int[]} {keyswitch_idx} ){Builtin, None, num_elements}) + 1]{int} {_keyswitch} , KEY_COLOR_RED{int} {KEY_COLOR_RED} ){Builtin, None, set_key_color}
		end if
		inc(key[0]{int} {key} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
end function

function sustain_release
	if(max1{int} {max1}  # -1)
		note_off(max1{int} {max1} ){Builtin, None, note_off}
		min1{int} {min1}  := play_note(min_random0{int} {min_random0} , 50, 0, 0){Builtin, None, play_note}
		set_event_par_arr(min1{int} {min1} , EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{int} {EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP} , 0, ALL_GROUPS{int} {ALL_GROUPS} ){Builtin, None, set_event_par_arr}
		dyn_release{int} {dyn_release}  := 0
		while(dyn_release{int} {dyn_release}  <= (num_dynamic_layers4{int} {num_dynamic_layers4}  - 1)) 
			set_event_par_arr(min1{int} {min1} , EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{int} {EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP} , 1, ((dyn_release{int} {dyn_release}  + result7{int} {result7} ) + num_dynamic_layers4{int} {num_dynamic_layers4} ) + title_groups{int} {title_groups} ){Builtin, None, set_event_par_arr}
			inc(dyn_release{int} {dyn_release} ){Builtin, None, inc}
		end while
		max1{int} {max1}  := -1
		max_random0{int} {max_random0}  := -1
	end if
end function

function legato_release
	if((note_held{int} {note_held}  = 0) and (note_id5{int} {note_id5}  # -1))
		note_id5{int} {note_id5}  := -1
		if(is_attack{int} {is_attack}  = 0)
			release_id1{int} {release_id1}  := play_note(get_event_par(note_id5{int} {note_id5} , EVENT_PAR_NOTE{int} {EVENT_PAR_NOTE} ){Builtin, None, get_event_par}, 50, 0, 0){Builtin, None, play_note}
			set_event_par_arr(release_id1{int} {release_id1} , EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{int} {EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP} , 0, ALL_GROUPS{int} {ALL_GROUPS} ){Builtin, None, set_event_par_arr}
			key[6]{int} {key}  := 0
			while(key[6]{int} {key}  <= (num_dynamic_layers6{int} {num_dynamic_layers6}  - 1)) 
				set_event_par_arr(release_id1{int} {release_id1} , EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{int} {EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP} , 1, ((((((((((key[6]{int} {key}  + start_group4{int} {start_group4} ) + num_rr4{int} {num_rr4} ) + title_groups{int} {title_groups} ) + num_dynamic_layers6{int} {num_dynamic_layers6} ) + title_groups{int} {title_groups} ) + num_dynamic_layers6{int} {num_dynamic_layers6} ) + title_groups{int} {title_groups} ) + (num_dynamic_layers6{int} {num_dynamic_layers6}  * sustain_fx{int} {sustain_fx} )) + title_groups{int} {title_groups} ) + trans_groups2{int} {trans_groups2} ) + title_groups{int} {title_groups} ){Builtin, None, set_event_par_arr}
				inc(key[6]{int} {key} ){Builtin, None, inc}
			end while
		end if
		playpos{int} {playpos}  := ((get_event_par(note_id5{int} {note_id5} , EVENT_PAR_PLAY_POS{int} {EVENT_PAR_PLAY_POS} ){Builtin, None, get_event_par} / 10) * (1 + (sh_right(140000 - (get_event_par(note_id5{int} {note_id5} , EVENT_PAR_PLAY_POS{int} {EVENT_PAR_PLAY_POS} ){Builtin, None, get_event_par} / 10), 31){Builtin, None, sh_right} .or. sh_right(get_event_par(note_id5{int} {note_id5} , EVENT_PAR_PLAY_POS{int} {EVENT_PAR_PLAY_POS} ){Builtin, None, get_event_par} / 10, 31){Builtin, None, sh_right}))) - (140000 * sh_right(140000 - (get_event_par(note_id5{int} {note_id5} , EVENT_PAR_PLAY_POS{int} {EVENT_PAR_PLAY_POS} ){Builtin, None, get_event_par} / 10), 31){Builtin, None, sh_right})
		fade_out(note_id5{int} {note_id5} , real_to_int((((int_to_real(playpos{int} {playpos} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real} - 0) * 229999) / 140000) + 1){Builtin, None, real_to_int}, 1){Builtin, None, fade_out}
		change_vol(release_id1{int} {release_id1} , - real_to_int((((int_to_real(playpos{int} {playpos} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real} - 0) * -9500) / 140000) + 10000){Builtin, None, real_to_int}, 0){Builtin, None, change_vol}
		get_event_ids(active_ids{int[]} {active_ids} ){Builtin, None, get_event_ids}
		key[6]{int} {key}  := 0
		while(key[6]{int} {key}  <= (num_elements(active_ids{int[]} {active_ids} ){Builtin, None, num_elements} - 1)) 
			if(not ((note_id5{int} {note_id5}  = active_ids[key[6]{int} {key} ]{int} {active_ids} ) or (release_id1{int} {release_id1}  = active_ids[key[6]{int} {key} ]{int} {active_ids} )))
				fade_out(active_ids[key[6]{int} {key} ]{int} {active_ids} , 250000, 1){Builtin, None, fade_out}
			end if
			inc(key[6]{int} {key} ){Builtin, None, inc}
		end while
	end if
end function

function one_shot_release
	note_id3{int} {note_id3}  := -1
	event_notes3{int} {event_notes3}  := -1
end function

function update.keyswitch
	call reset.keycolors{UserDefined, Call, reset.keycolors}
	key[2]{int} {key}  := 0
	while(key[2]{int} {key}  <= 15) 
		set_key_pressed(_keyswitch[(key[2]{int} {key}  * num_elements(keyswitch_idx{int[]} {keyswitch_idx} ){Builtin, None, num_elements}) + 1]{int} {_keyswitch} , keyswitches_pressed[key[2]{int} {key} ]{int} {keyswitches_pressed} ){Builtin, None, set_key_pressed}
		set_control_par(btn_keyswitches[key[2]{int} {key} ]{int} {btn_keyswitches} , CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_VALUE} , keyswitches_pressed[key[2]{int} {key} ]{int} {keyswitches_pressed} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
		if(keyswitches_pressed[key[2]{int} {key} ]{int} {keyswitches_pressed}  = 1)
			Boolean1{int} {Boolean1}  := key[2]{int} {key} 
			Boolean0{int} {Boolean0}  := _keyswitch[(key[2]{int} {key}  * num_elements(keyswitch_idx{int[]} {keyswitch_idx} ){Builtin, None, num_elements}) + 10]{int} {_keyswitch} 
			call update.keycolor_mapped{UserDefined, Call, update.keycolor_mapped}
		end if
		if(_keyswitch[(key[2]{int} {key}  * num_elements(keyswitch_idx{int[]} {keyswitch_idx} ){Builtin, None, num_elements}) + 1]{int} {_keyswitch}  = 127)
			keyswitches_pressed[key[2]{int} {key} ]{int} {keyswitches_pressed}  := 1
		end if
		if(_keyswitch[key[2]{int} {key}  * num_elements(keyswitch_idx{int[]} {keyswitch_idx} ){Builtin, None, num_elements}]{int} {_keyswitch}  = 0)
			keyswitches_pressed[key[2]{int} {key} ]{int} {keyswitches_pressed}  := 0
		end if
		inc(key[2]{int} {key} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	call color_keyswitches{UserDefined, Call, color_keyswitches}
	key[3]{int} {key}  := 0
	while(key[3]{int} {key}  <= 15) 
		select(_keyswitch[(key[3]{int} {key}  * num_elements(keyswitch_idx{int[]} {keyswitch_idx} ){Builtin, None, num_elements}) + 4]{int} {_keyswitch} )
		case 2
			key[4]{int} {key}  := _keyswitch[(key[3]{int} {key}  * num_elements(keyswitch_idx{int[]} {keyswitch_idx} ){Builtin, None, num_elements}) + 13]{int} {_keyswitch} 
			while(key[4]{int} {key}  <= _keyswitch[(key[3]{int} {key}  * num_elements(keyswitch_idx{int[]} {keyswitch_idx} ){Builtin, None, num_elements}) + 14]{int} {_keyswitch} ) 
				min_random0{int} {min_random0}  := key[4]{int} {key} 
				max_random0{int} {max_random0}  := _keyswitch_event_notes[(key[3]{int} {key}  * 128) + key[4]{int} {key} ]{int} {_keyswitch_event_notes} 
				max1{int} {max1}  := _keyswitch_event_ids[(key[3]{int} {key}  * 128) + key[4]{int} {key} ]{int} {_keyswitch_event_ids} 
				min1{int} {min1}  := release_id{int} {release_id} 
				result7{int} {result7}  := _keyswitch[(key[3]{int} {key}  * num_elements(keyswitch_idx{int[]} {keyswitch_idx} ){Builtin, None, num_elements}) + 3]{int} {_keyswitch}  + title_groups{int} {title_groups} 
				num_dynamic_layers4{int} {num_dynamic_layers4}  := _keyswitch[(key[3]{int} {key}  * num_elements(keyswitch_idx{int[]} {keyswitch_idx} ){Builtin, None, num_elements}) + 5]{int} {_keyswitch} 
				num_rr1{int} {num_rr1}  := _keyswitch[(key[3]{int} {key}  * num_elements(keyswitch_idx{int[]} {keyswitch_idx} ){Builtin, None, num_elements}) + 6]{int} {_keyswitch} 
				call sustain_release{UserDefined, Call, sustain_release}
				inc(key[4]{int} {key} ){Builtin, None, inc}
			end while
		case 3
			note_held{int} {note_held}  := 0
			key[4]{int} {key}  := _keyswitch[(key[3]{int} {key}  * num_elements(keyswitch_idx{int[]} {keyswitch_idx} ){Builtin, None, num_elements}) + 13]{int} {_keyswitch} 
			while(key[4]{int} {key}  <= _keyswitch[(key[3]{int} {key}  * num_elements(keyswitch_idx{int[]} {keyswitch_idx} ){Builtin, None, num_elements}) + 14]{int} {_keyswitch} ) 
				note_id5{int} {note_id5}  := _keyswitch_event_ids[(key[3]{int} {key}  * 128) + key[4]{int} {key} ]{int} {_keyswitch_event_ids} 
				release_id1{int} {release_id1}  := release_id{int} {release_id} 
				start_group4{int} {start_group4}  := _keyswitch[(key[3]{int} {key}  * num_elements(keyswitch_idx{int[]} {keyswitch_idx} ){Builtin, None, num_elements}) + 3]{int} {_keyswitch} 
				num_dynamic_layers6{int} {num_dynamic_layers6}  := _keyswitch[(key[3]{int} {key}  * num_elements(keyswitch_idx{int[]} {keyswitch_idx} ){Builtin, None, num_elements}) + 5]{int} {_keyswitch} 
				num_rr4{int} {num_rr4}  := _keyswitch[(key[3]{int} {key}  * num_elements(keyswitch_idx{int[]} {keyswitch_idx} ){Builtin, None, num_elements}) + 6]{int} {_keyswitch} 
				trans_groups2{int} {trans_groups2}  := _keyswitch[(key[3]{int} {key}  * num_elements(keyswitch_idx{int[]} {keyswitch_idx} ){Builtin, None, num_elements}) + 8]{int} {_keyswitch} 
				call legato_release{UserDefined, Call, legato_release}
				inc(key[4]{int} {key} ){Builtin, None, inc}
			end while
		case 0 to 1
			key[4]{int} {key}  := _keyswitch[(key[3]{int} {key}  * num_elements(keyswitch_idx{int[]} {keyswitch_idx} ){Builtin, None, num_elements}) + 13]{int} {_keyswitch} 
			while(key[4]{int} {key}  <= _keyswitch[(key[3]{int} {key}  * num_elements(keyswitch_idx{int[]} {keyswitch_idx} ){Builtin, None, num_elements}) + 14]{int} {_keyswitch} ) 
				event_notes3{int} {event_notes3}  := _keyswitch_event_notes[(key[3]{int} {key}  * 128) + key[4]{int} {key} ]{int} {_keyswitch_event_notes} 
				note_id3{int} {note_id3}  := _keyswitch_event_ids[(key[3]{int} {key}  * 128) + key[4]{int} {key} ]{int} {_keyswitch_event_ids} 
				call one_shot_release{UserDefined, Call, one_shot_release}
				inc(key[4]{int} {key} ){Builtin, None, inc}
			end while
		end select
		inc(key[3]{int} {key} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
end function

function get_keyrange{thread-unsafe}
	keys{int} {keys}  := 0
	while(keys{int} {keys}  <= 127) 
		blip_note{int} {blip_note}  := play_note(keys{int} {keys} , 1, 0, 1){Builtin, None, play_note}
		set_event_par_arr(blip_note{int} {blip_note} , EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{int} {EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP} , 0, ALL_GROUPS{int} {ALL_GROUPS} ){Builtin, None, set_event_par_arr}
		change_vol(blip_note{int} {blip_note} , -2000000, 0){Builtin, None, change_vol}
		set_event_par_arr(blip_note{int} {blip_note} , EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{int} {EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP} , 1, _keyswitch[(keyswitch_idx2[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} {NI_CALLBACK_ID}  mod 100]{int} {keyswitch_idx2}  * num_elements(keyswitch_idx{int[]} {keyswitch_idx} ){Builtin, None, num_elements}) + 3]{int} {_keyswitch} ){Builtin, None, set_event_par_arr}
		wait(1){Builtin, None, wait}
		zone_id{int} {zone_id}  := get_event_par(blip_note{int} {blip_note} , EVENT_PAR_ZONE_ID{int} {EVENT_PAR_ZONE_ID} ){Builtin, None, get_event_par}
		if(zone_id{int} {zone_id}  # -1)
			_keyswitch[(keyswitch_idx2[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} {NI_CALLBACK_ID}  mod 100]{int} {keyswitch_idx2}  * num_elements(keyswitch_idx{int[]} {keyswitch_idx} ){Builtin, None, num_elements}) + 13]{int} {_keyswitch}  := keys{int} {keys} 
			message("Low: " & midi.note_names[keys{int} {keys} ]{string} {midi.note_names} ){Builtin, None, message}
			keys{int} {keys}  := 127
		end if
		fade_out(blip_note{int} {blip_note} , 0, 1){Builtin, None, fade_out}
		inc(keys{int} {keys} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	keys{int} {keys}  := 0
	while(keys{int} {keys}  <= 127) 
		blip_note{int} {blip_note}  := play_note(127 - keys{int} {keys} , 1, 0, 1){Builtin, None, play_note}
		set_event_par_arr(blip_note{int} {blip_note} , EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{int} {EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP} , 0, ALL_GROUPS{int} {ALL_GROUPS} ){Builtin, None, set_event_par_arr}
		change_vol(blip_note{int} {blip_note} , -2000000, 0){Builtin, None, change_vol}
		set_event_par_arr(blip_note{int} {blip_note} , EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{int} {EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP} , 1, _keyswitch[(keyswitch_idx2[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} {NI_CALLBACK_ID}  mod 100]{int} {keyswitch_idx2}  * num_elements(keyswitch_idx{int[]} {keyswitch_idx} ){Builtin, None, num_elements}) + 3]{int} {_keyswitch} ){Builtin, None, set_event_par_arr}
		wait(1){Builtin, None, wait}
		zone_id{int} {zone_id}  := get_event_par(blip_note{int} {blip_note} , EVENT_PAR_ZONE_ID{int} {EVENT_PAR_ZONE_ID} ){Builtin, None, get_event_par}
		if(zone_id{int} {zone_id}  # -1)
			_keyswitch[(keyswitch_idx2[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} {NI_CALLBACK_ID}  mod 100]{int} {keyswitch_idx2}  * num_elements(keyswitch_idx{int[]} {keyswitch_idx} ){Builtin, None, num_elements}) + 14]{int} {_keyswitch}  := 127 - keys{int} {keys} 
			message("High: " & midi.note_names[127 - keys{int} {keys} ]{string} {midi.note_names} ){Builtin, None, message}
			keys{int} {keys}  := 127
		end if
		fade_out(blip_note{int} {blip_note} , 0, 1){Builtin, None, fade_out}
		inc(keys{int} {keys} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
end function

function fill_mapped_notes{thread-unsafe}
	keys{int} {keys}  := 0
	while(keys{int} {keys}  <= 127) 
		_keyswitch_mapped_notes[(keyswitch_idx1[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} {NI_CALLBACK_ID}  mod 100]{int} {keyswitch_idx1}  * 128) + keys{int} {keys} ]{int} {_keyswitch_mapped_notes}  := 0
		blip_note{int} {blip_note}  := play_note(keys{int} {keys} , 1, 0, 1){Builtin, None, play_note}
		set_event_par_arr(blip_note{int} {blip_note} , EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{int} {EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP} , 0, ALL_GROUPS{int} {ALL_GROUPS} ){Builtin, None, set_event_par_arr}
		change_vol(blip_note{int} {blip_note} , -2000000, 0){Builtin, None, change_vol}

		wait(1){Builtin, None, wait}

			message(zone_id{int} {zone_id}  & ", " & _keyswitch[(keyswitch_idx1[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} {NI_CALLBACK_ID}  mod 100]{int} {keyswitch_idx1}  * num_elements(keyswitch_idx{int[]} {keyswitch_idx} ){Builtin, None, num_elements}) + 3]{int} {_keyswitch} ){Builtin, None, message}

		end if

function analyze_vibrato_groups
	Boolean1{int} {Boolean1}  := -1
	lib.i{int} {lib.i}  := 0
	while(lib.i{int} {lib.i}  <= (num_elements(vibrato_groups{int[]} {vibrato_groups} ){Builtin, None, num_elements} - 1)) 
		vibrato_groups[lib.i{int} {lib.i} ]{int} {vibrato_groups}  := Boolean1{int} {Boolean1} 
		inc(lib.i{int} {lib.i} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	ii{int} {ii}  := 0
	i{int} {i}  := 0
	while(i{int} {i}  <= 15) 
		select(_keyswitch[(i{int} {i}  * num_elements(keyswitch_idx{int[]} {keyswitch_idx} ){Builtin, None, num_elements}) + 4]{int} {_keyswitch} )
		case 2
			message(find_mod(_keyswitch[(i{int} {i}  * num_elements(keyswitch_idx{int[]} {keyswitch_idx} ){Builtin, None, num_elements}) + 3]{int} {_keyswitch} , "LFO_MULTI D"){Builtin, None, find_mod}){Builtin, None, message}
			if(find_mod(_keyswitch[(i{int} {i}  * num_elements(keyswitch_idx{int[]} {keyswitch_idx} ){Builtin, None, num_elements}) + 3]{int} {_keyswitch} , "LFO_MULTI D"){Builtin, None, find_mod} # 0)
				j{int} {j}  := 0
				while(j{int} {j}  <= (_keyswitch[(i{int} {i}  * num_elements(keyswitch_idx{int[]} {keyswitch_idx} ){Builtin, None, num_elements}) + 5]{int} {_keyswitch}  - 1)) 
					vibrato_groups[ii{int} {ii} ]{int} {vibrato_groups}  := _keyswitch[(i{int} {i}  * num_elements(keyswitch_idx{int[]} {keyswitch_idx} ){Builtin, None, num_elements}) + 3]{int} {_keyswitch}  + j{int} {j} 
					inc(ii{int} {ii} ){Builtin, None, inc}
					inc(j{int} {j} ){Builtin, None, inc}
				end while
			end if
		case 3
			j{int} {j}  := 0
			while(j{int} {j}  <= (((_keyswitch[(i{int} {i}  * num_elements(keyswitch_idx{int[]} {keyswitch_idx} ){Builtin, None, num_elements}) + 5]{int} {_keyswitch}  + title_groups{int} {title_groups} ) + _keyswitch[(i{int} {i}  * num_elements(keyswitch_idx{int[]} {keyswitch_idx} ){Builtin, None, num_elements}) + 5]{int} {_keyswitch} ) - 1)) 
				vibrato_groups[ii{int} {ii} ]{int} {vibrato_groups}  := ((_keyswitch[(i{int} {i}  * num_elements(keyswitch_idx{int[]} {keyswitch_idx} ){Builtin, None, num_elements}) + 3]{int} {_keyswitch}  + _keyswitch[(i{int} {i}  * num_elements(keyswitch_idx{int[]} {keyswitch_idx} ){Builtin, None, num_elements}) + 6]{int} {_keyswitch} ) + title_groups{int} {title_groups} ) + j{int} {j} 
				inc(ii{int} {ii} ){Builtin, None, inc}
				inc(j{int} {j} ){Builtin, None, inc}
			end while
		end select
		inc(i{int} {i} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
end function

function analyze{thread-unsafe}
	if(_keyswitch[keyswitch_idx0[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} {NI_CALLBACK_ID}  mod 100]{int} {keyswitch_idx0}  * num_elements(keyswitch_idx{int[]} {keyswitch_idx} ){Builtin, None, num_elements}]{int} {_keyswitch}  = 1)
		call reset.keycolors{UserDefined, Call, reset.keycolors}
		keyswitch_idx2[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} {NI_CALLBACK_ID}  mod 100]{int} {keyswitch_idx2}  := keyswitch_idx0[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} {NI_CALLBACK_ID}  mod 100]{int} {keyswitch_idx0} 
		call get_keyrange{UserDefined, Call, get_keyrange}
		keyswitch_idx1[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} {NI_CALLBACK_ID}  mod 100]{int} {keyswitch_idx1}  := keyswitch_idx0[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} {NI_CALLBACK_ID}  mod 100]{int} {keyswitch_idx0} 
		call fill_mapped_notes{UserDefined, Call, fill_mapped_notes}
		Boolean1{int} {Boolean1}  := keyswitch_idx0[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} {NI_CALLBACK_ID}  mod 100]{int} {keyswitch_idx0} 
		Boolean0{int} {Boolean0}  := _keyswitch[(keyswitch_idx0[NI_CALLBACK_ID{int} {NI_CALLBACK_ID}  mod 100]{int} {keyswitch_idx0}  * num_elements(keyswitch_idx{int[]} {keyswitch_idx} ){Builtin, None, num_elements}) + 10]{int} {_keyswitch} 
		call update.keycolor_mapped{UserDefined, Call, update.keycolor_mapped}
		call analyze_vibrato_groups{UserDefined, Call, analyze_vibrato_groups}
		call update.keyswitch{UserDefined, Call, update.keyswitch}
	end if
end function

function update.cc_vibrato
	set_controller(101, real_to_int((((int_to_real(sli_vibrato{int} {sli_vibrato} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real} - 0) * 127) / 1e+06) + 0){Builtin, None, real_to_int}){Builtin, None, set_controller}
	i{int} {i}  := 0
	while(i{int} {i}  <= (search(vibrato_groups{int[]} {vibrato_groups} , -1){Builtin, None, search} - 1)) 
		set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY{int} {ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY} , sli_vibrato{int} {sli_vibrato} , vibrato_groups[i{int} {i} ]{int} {vibrato_groups} , find_mod(vibrato_groups[i{int} {i} ]{int} {vibrato_groups} , "LFO_MULTI D"){Builtin, None, find_mod}, find_target(vibrato_groups[i{int} {i} ]{int} {vibrato_groups} , find_mod(vibrato_groups[i{int} {i} ]{int} {vibrato_groups} , "LFO_MULTI D"){Builtin, None, find_mod}, "LFO_MULTI D" & "_EQ_GAIN_1"){Builtin, None, find_target}){Builtin, None, set_engine_par}
		set_engine_par(ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY{int} {ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY} , (sli_vibrato{int} {sli_vibrato}  * current_pitchModulation{int} {current_pitchModulation} ) / 1000000, vibrato_groups[i{int} {i} ]{int} {vibrato_groups} , find_mod(vibrato_groups[i{int} {i} ]{int} {vibrato_groups} , "LFO_MULTI D"){Builtin, None, find_mod}, find_target(vibrato_groups[i{int} {i} ]{int} {vibrato_groups} , find_mod(vibrato_groups[i{int} {i} ]{int} {vibrato_groups} , "LFO_MULTI D"){Builtin, None, find_mod}, "LFO_MULTI D" & "_PITCH"){Builtin, None, find_target}){Builtin, None, set_engine_par}
		inc(i{int} {i} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
end function

function legato.init_arrays
	i{int} {i}  := 0
	while(i{int} {i}  <= 1999) 
		if(sus_release_time[i{int} {i} ]{int} {sus_release_time}  = 0)
			sus_release_time[i{int} {i} ]{int} {sus_release_time}  := 280
		end if
		if(trans_fadeIn_time[i{int} {i} ]{int} {trans_fadeIn_time}  = 0)
			trans_fadeIn_time[i{int} {i} ]{int} {trans_fadeIn_time}  := 780000
		end if
		if(trans_fadeOut_time[i{int} {i} ]{int} {trans_fadeOut_time}  = 0)
			trans_fadeOut_time[i{int} {i} ]{int} {trans_fadeOut_time}  := 500000
		end if
		if(trans_wait_time[i{int} {i} ]{int} {trans_wait_time}  = 0)
			trans_wait_time[i{int} {i} ]{int} {trans_wait_time}  := 696000
		end if
		if(sus_fadeIn_time[i{int} {i} ]{int} {sus_fadeIn_time}  = 0)
			sus_fadeIn_time[i{int} {i} ]{int} {sus_fadeIn_time}  := 780000
		end if
		if(trans_zone_ids[i{int} {i} ]{int} {trans_zone_ids}  = 0)
			trans_zone_ids[i{int} {i} ]{int} {trans_zone_ids}  := -1
		end if
		inc(i{int} {i} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
end function

function one_shot
	if(min1{int} {min1}  # result7{int} {result7} )
		min1{int} {min1}  := result7{int} {result7} 
		num_dynamic_layers4{int} {num_dynamic_layers4}  := (num_dynamic_layers4{int} {num_dynamic_layers4}  + 1) mod num_rr1{int} {num_rr1} 
		max_random0{int} {max_random0}  := play_note(result7{int} {result7} , max1{int} {max1} , 0, Boolean1{int} {Boolean1} ){Builtin, None, play_note}
		set_event_par_arr(max_random0{int} {max_random0} , EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{int} {EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP} , 0, ALL_GROUPS{int} {ALL_GROUPS} ){Builtin, None, set_event_par_arr}
		set_event_par_arr(max_random0{int} {max_random0} , EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{int} {EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP} , 1, num_dynamic_layers4{int} {num_dynamic_layers4}  + min_random0{int} {min_random0} ){Builtin, None, set_event_par_arr}
	end if
end function

function sustain
	if(min1{int} {min1}  = -1)
		min1{int} {min1}  := result7{int} {result7} 
		Boolean0{int} {Boolean0}  := play_note(result7{int} {result7} , max1{int} {max1} , 0, 0){Builtin, None, play_note}
		set_event_par_arr(Boolean0{int} {Boolean0} , EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{int} {EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP} , 0, ALL_GROUPS{int} {ALL_GROUPS} ){Builtin, None, set_event_par_arr}
		dyn{int} {dyn}  := 0
		while(dyn{int} {dyn}  <= (max_random0{int} {max_random0}  - 1)) 
			set_event_par_arr(Boolean0{int} {Boolean0} , EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP{int} {EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP} , 1, dyn{int} {dyn}  + Boolean1{int} {Boolean1} ){Builtin, None, set_event_par_arr}
			inc(dyn{int} {dyn} ){Builtin, None, inc}
		end while
	end if
end function

function get_trans_idx
	if(search(trans_zone_ids{int[]} {trans_zone_ids} , (sh_left(lsb(abs(trans_group{int} {trans_group}  - get_zone_par(get_event_par(event_notes3{int} {event_notes3} , EVENT_PAR_ZONE_ID{int} {EVENT_PAR_ZONE_ID} ){Builtin, None, get_event_par}, ZONE_PAR_GROUP{int} {ZONE_PAR_GROUP} ){Builtin, None, get_zone_par}){Builtin, None, abs}){Builtin, None, lsb}, 14){Builtin, None, sh_left} .or. sh_left(lsb(get_zone_par(get_event_par(event_notes3{int} {event_notes3} , EVENT_PAR_ZONE_ID{int} {EVENT_PAR_ZONE_ID} ){Builtin, None, get_event_par}, ZONE_PAR_HIGH_VELO{int} {ZONE_PAR_HIGH_VELO} ){Builtin, None, get_zone_par}){Builtin, None, lsb}, 7){Builtin, None, sh_left}) .or. lsb(get_zone_par(get_event_par(event_notes3{int} {event_notes3} , EVENT_PAR_ZONE_ID{int} {EVENT_PAR_ZONE_ID} ){Builtin, None, get_event_par}, ZONE_PAR_ROOT_KEY{int} {ZONE_PAR_ROOT_KEY} ){Builtin, None, get_zone_par}){Builtin, None, lsb}){Builtin, None, search} = -1)
		note_id3{int} {note_id3}  := search(trans_zone_ids{int[]} {trans_zone_ids} , -1){Builtin, None, search}
	else
		note_id3{int} {note_id3}  := search(trans_zone_ids{int[]} {trans_zone_ids} , (sh_left(lsb(abs(trans_group{int} {trans_group}  - get_zone_par(get_event_par(event_notes3{int} {event_notes3} , EVENT_PAR_ZONE_ID{int} {EVENT_PAR_ZONE_ID} ){Builtin, None, get_event_par}, ZONE_PAR_GROUP{int} {ZONE_PAR_GROUP} ){Builtin, None, get_zone_par}){Builtin, None, abs}){Builtin, None, lsb}, 14){Builtin, None, sh_left} .or. sh_left(lsb(get_zone_par(get_event_par(event_notes3{int} {event_notes3} , EVENT_PAR_ZONE_ID{int} {EVENT_PAR_ZONE_ID} ){Builtin, None, get_event_par}, ZONE_PAR_HIGH_VELO{int} {ZONE_PAR_HIGH_VELO} ){Builtin, None, get_zone_par}){Builtin, None, lsb}, 7){Builtin, None, sh_left}) .or. lsb(get_zone_par(get_event_par(event_notes3{int} {event_notes3} , EVENT_PAR_ZONE_ID{int} {EVENT_PAR_ZONE_ID} ){Builtin, None, get_event_par}, ZONE_PAR_ROOT_KEY{int} {ZONE_PAR_ROOT_KEY} ){Builtin, None, get_zone_par}){Builtin, None, lsb}){Builtin, None, search}
	end if
end function

			set_menu_item_str(get_ui_id(mnu_preset{int} {mnu_preset} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, i{int} {i} , vibPresetNames[i{int} {i} ]{string} {vibPresetNames} ){Builtin, None, set_menu_item_str}
			set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(mnu_preset{int} {mnu_preset} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, i{int} {i} , 1){Builtin, None, set_menu_item_visibility}
		else
			set_menu_item_visibility(get_ui_id(mnu_preset{int} {mnu_preset} ){Builtin, None, get_ui_id}, i{int} {i} , 0){Builtin, None, set_menu_item_visibility}
		end if

function load.array
	i{int} {i}  := 1
	while(i{int} {i}  <= 99) 
		if(uiControls[i{int} {i}  - 1]{int} {uiControls}  # 0)
			set_control_par(uiControls[i{int} {i}  - 1]{int} {uiControls} , CONTROL_PAR_VALUE{int} {CONTROL_PAR_VALUE} , vibrato_preset[i{int} {i} ]{int} {vibrato_preset} ){Builtin, None, set_control_par}
		end if
		inc(i{int} {i} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	i{int} {i}  := 0
	while(i{int} {i}  <= (search(vibrato_groups{int[]} {vibrato_groups} , -1){Builtin, None, search} - 1)) 
		set_engine_par(ADHSR_ENGINE_PARAMS[0]{int} {ADHSR_ENGINE_PARAMS} , sli_envRateCurve{int} {sli_envRateCurve} , vibrato_groups[i{int} {i} ]{int} {vibrato_groups} , find_mod(vibrato_groups[i{int} {i} ]{int} {vibrato_groups} , "ENV_AHDSR"){Builtin, None, find_mod}, -1){Builtin, None, set_engine_par}
		inc(i{int} {i} ){Builtin, None, inc}
	end while
	tbl_rate.curve{int} {tbl_rate.curve}  := sli_envRateCurve{int} {sli_envRateCurve} 
	tbl_rate.attack_point{real} {tbl_rate.attack_point}  := pow(10, (log(1.5){Builtin, None, log} / log(10){Builtin, None, log}) + (0.51 * ((log(0.056){Builtin, None, log} / log(10){Builtin, None, log}) - (log(1.5){Builtin, None, log} / log(10){Builtin, None, log})))){Builtin, None, pow}
	tbl_rate.release_idx{int} {tbl_rate.release_idx}  := 93
	tbl_rate.attack{real} {tbl_rate.attack}  := (((int_to_real(sli_envRateAttack{int} {sli_envRateAttack} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real} - 0) * (tbl_rate.attack_point{real} {tbl_rate.attack_point}  - 1.5)) / 1e+06) + 1.5
	tbl_rate.hold{int} {tbl_rate.hold}  := (sli_envRateHold{int} {sli_envRateHold}  * 18) / 1000000
	tbl_rate.decay{real} {tbl_rate.decay}  := (((int_to_real(sli_envRateDecay{int} {sli_envRateDecay} ){Builtin, None, int_to_real} - 0) * 14200) / 1e+06) + 800
	tbl_rate.sustain{int} {tbl_rate.sustain}  := (sli_envRateSustain{int} {sli_envRateSustain}  * 1000) / 1000000
	tbl_rate.release{real} {tbl_rate.release}  := 30200
	i{int} {i}  := 0
	while(i{int} {i}  <= (num_elements(tbl_rate.env_array{real[]} {tbl_rate.env_array} ){Builtin, None, num_elements} - 1))
